question:
[Previous Feedback] Performance metrics recorded with all time fields correctly formatted.

Please add a version_history array to day03/daily_report.json to track report iterations: v1.0 (09:30 initial draft), v1.1 (10:15 added event timeline data), and v1.2 (current time around 11:00 final review version). Each entry should include version, created_at, and changes fields.

content.text:
[Thu 2026-03-19 02:04 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Performance metrics recorded with all time fields correctly formatted.

arguments.command: test -f day03/daily_report.json && echo exists || echo missing

content.text:
